title: Sysco to Webcast Presentation at the Wells Fargo 6th Annual Consumer Conference
text: HOUSTON, Aug. 31, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Sysco Corporation (NYSE:SYY) today announced that the Company will webcast its presentation at the Wells Fargo 6th Annual Consumer Conference on Thursday, Sept. 21, at 11:00 a.m. EDT.

title: Sysco names Greg Bertrand global chief operating officer
text: Sysco SYY, +0.28% has named Greg Bertrand as executive vice president, global chief operating officer, effective Sept. 1.

title: Sysco Declares Quarterly Dividend Payment
text: HOUSTON, Aug. 24, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Sysco Corporation (NYSE:SYY) today announced that the Board of Directors declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.50 per share, payable on Oct. 27, 2023, to common stockholders of record at the close of business on Oct. 6, 2023.

title: 3 Dividend Kings with a Royally Good Upside
text: Dividend Kings are tried and true investments with a long history of sustained dividend payments and distribution increases. The kind of track records that help investors sleep soundly at night, but these stocks are not always easy to buy.

title: These Are The Reasons Why We Are Bullish On Sysco
text: Sysco's stock has underperformed the market year-to-date, but it could be an attractive holding due to its latest earnings results, commitment to returning value to shareholders, and valuation. Despite missing analyst estimates, Sysco's revenue and EPS have grown, indicating strong demand for its products. The company's profitability has also improved. The stock appears to be attractively valued compared to its peers in the food distributors industry.

title: The Ultimate 10 Retirement Salvation Dividend Aristocrats For August
text: The answer is simple for those worried about high market valuations hurting future returns. Don't buy overvalued stocks. While the average investor is at risk of a lost decade or two, smart investors buying fast-growing aristocrats trading at reasonable prices have nothing to fear. The ten dividend aristocrats are trading at a 15% discount that offers a 16% annual return potential long-term, similar to what they have delivered for 30 years.

title: Sysco Corporation (SYY) Q4 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Sysco Corporation (NYSE:SYY ) Q4 2023 Earnings Conference Call August 1, 2023 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Kevin Kim - VP of IR Kevin Hourican - President and CEO Kenny Cheung - CFO Neil Russell - Chief Administrative Officer Conference Call Participants Edward Kelly - Wells Fargo Joshua Long - Stephens Inc. John Heinbockel - Guggenheim Securities Kelly Bania - BMO Capital Markets John Ivankoe - JPMorgan Alex Slagle - Jefferies Operator Welcome to Sysco's Fourth Quarter Fiscal Year 2023 Conference Call. As a reminder, today's call is being recorded.

title: Sysco's (SYY) Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates, Sales Advance Y/Y
text: Sysco's (SYY) fourth-quarter fiscal 2023 results reflect higher sales and earnings on volume gains, market share growth, the progress of the Recipe for Growth plan and solid cost management.

title: Sysco (SYY) Reports Q4 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Sysco (SYY) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended June 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: Sysco (SYY) Beats Q4 Earnings Estimates
text: Sysco (SYY) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.34 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.33 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.15 per share a year ago.

title: Sysco Reports Record Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2023 Sales, Operating Income and Cash Flow
text: HOUSTON, Aug. 01, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Sysco Corporation (NYSE: SYY) (“Sysco” or the “company”) today announced financial results for its 13-week fourth fiscal quarter and its fiscal year ended July 1, 2023.
